## Safety checklist

- [ ] No production drone images, generated projects/GeoTIFFs, or large outputs were committed.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, license data, local config, or sensitive logs were committed.
- [ ] Output overwrite and destructive actions remain explicit.
- [ ] Human review is required; this PR will not auto-merge.
